title: Bridge Essay: [Source monitoring: general presentation and review of literature in schizophren

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal** (Phase 10) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Imaginal to mechanistic neuroscience through [Source, monitoring:, general, presentation, and.

**[Source monitoring: general presentation and review of literature in schizophrenia].** — Encephale. PMID: 20850604. DOI: 10.1016/j.encep.2009.12.010. SOURCE MONITORING FRAMEWORK: Source monitoring refers to the ability to remember the origin of information. Three source monitoring processes can be distinguished: external source monitoring, internal or self-monitoring and reality monitoring (i.e. discrimination between internal and external sources of information). Source monitoring decisions are based on memory characteristics recorded such as perceptions, contextual information or emotional reactions and heuristic or more controlled judgemen
